attacking_style: Not an attacker; operates exclusively in sprint finales, typically launching or positioning in final 200m. When sprinting for himself, struggles with timing—either goes too early or hesitates fatally.
team_tactics: Elite leadout pilot holding pace to 200m barrier, delivering textbook positioning even into headwind finales. Team invests heavily (3+ riders through final corner) but conversion rate is inconsistent.
terrain_preference: Pure flat sprint stages only. Exposed immediately on any categorized climb (dropped on Cat-3). Executes well in technical/headwind finales requiring sustained power through 200m mark.
vulnerability: Poor positioning and race craft when sprinting for himself—boxing/hesitation costs him despite superior raw speed. Completely non-functional on any climbing terrain. Timing errors frequent when not in leadout role.
key_patterns: Holds leadout pace to exactly 200m, textbook execution documented across multiple Grand Tours
Disappears or mistimes sprint when riding for own result despite possessing raw speed
Gets boxed/positioned poorly in chaotic finales, hesitates when decisive action needed
Dropped immediately on any climb, zero climbing capacity even Cat-3 efforts
Can finish high (2nd without leadout) but inconsistent converting positioning to results
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022 shows dual capacity (elite leadout + occasional own finish) but persistent positioning errors and total climbing weakness unchanged from 2018
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 2
